nasb.text: The rulers brought the onyx stones and the stones for setting for the ephod and for the breastpiece;

esv.text: And the leaders brought onyx stones and stones to be set, for the ephod and for the breastpiece,

cnv.text: 首領把紅瑪瑙寶石，以及可以鑲嵌在以弗得和胸牌上的寶石都帶了來；

ccb.text: 众首领奉献了红玛瑙和其他宝石，用来镶嵌在以弗得和胸牌上。
